task_completion.description: Verify the correct study is selected in OpenClinica.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica interface header or active study indicator shows 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' or 'DM-TRIAL-2024'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Subject Group Class name and type are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form for creating a Subject Group Class shows 'Treatment Arm' in the Name field and 'Arm' selected in the Type dropdown.

task_completion.description: Verify the first treatment group (Metformin 500mg) is added with its description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The group name 'Metformin 500mg' is entered in a Subject Group field, along with the exact description 'Active treatment arm receiving metformin 500mg twice daily'.

task_completion.description: Verify the second treatment group (Metformin 1000mg) is added with its description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The group name 'Metformin 1000mg' is entered in a Subject Group field, along with the exact description 'Active treatment arm receiving metformin 1000mg twice daily'.

task_completion.description: Verify the placebo group is added with its description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The group name 'Placebo' is entered in a Subject Group field, along with the exact description 'Placebo control arm receiving matching placebo twice daily'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Subject Group Class was successfully saved and created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message confirming the creation of the Subject Group Class, or a table/list of Subject Group Classes displaying the newly created 'Treatment Arm' class with its 3 associated groups.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenClinica web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the OpenClinica GUI, not a terminal window executing API requests or SQL commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual OpenClinica application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica branding, navigation menus, and standard web layout should be visible, rather than text pasted into a notepad or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the results appear to be genuine system outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Success messages and data tables should match the standard OpenClinica styling without signs of browser 'Inspect Element' tampering or manual HTML editing.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Study: 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' (DM-TRIAL-2024). Class Name: 'Treatment Arm'. Class Type: 'Arm'. Required Groups: 1) Name: 'Metformin 500mg', Description: 'Active treatment arm receiving metformin 500mg twice daily'. 2) Name: 'Metformin 1000mg', Description: 'Active treatment arm receiving metformin 1000mg twice daily'. 3) Name: 'Placebo', Description: 'Placebo control arm receiving matching placebo twice daily'.
